$operator.summary: Named pipeline model configurations. Each configuration maps every workflow persona to the Cursor model that should execute it.
$operator.note: Change active_config, then run ./bin/pan models --sync. New runs snapshot the active mapping so later config edits do not change an in-flight run.

default.summary: Balance of focused coding, strong review, and frontier planning.

complex.summary: Higher-reasoning review and QA for complex or high-risk work.

auto.summary: Cursor-managed routing except for the bounded coding workhorse.
